feature.name: Glob matcher core
feature.description: Extract coverage.py glob pattern preparation and file-path matching used for include/omit and report filters.
included_behaviors: prepare relative and absolute glob patterns for matching
match file paths against include/omit style glob lists
convert glob syntax to compiled regex with Windows slash tolerance
reject invalid glob patterns such as triple-star segments
excluded_behaviors: original project tests and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: Glob matching depends on path canonicalization helpers, platform flags, regex joining utilities, and error types spread across multiple modules.
signals: glob tokenization and regex compilation pipeline
shared files.py utilities also used by unrelated features

output.import: from featurelifted import GlobMatcher, prep_patterns, globs_to_regex
output.signature: GlobMatcher(pats: Iterable[str], name: str = 'unknown').match(fpath: str) -> bool
